svg.text: How spatial data flows through an iLand project

g.text: WGS84, UTM, state plane, national grids — whatever you have
QGIS: reproject ALL to one projected CRS (meters)
This is the critical step — everything must be in the same metric projection
Export as .asc grids (no CRS metadata embedded)
ESRI ASCII grid: only stores xllcorner, yllcorner, cellsize as raw numbers
No CRS, no reprojection — assumes cellsize is meters
Output .asc files inherit same coordinate system
